name: SCC_GetCertificateChainCertificate
title: SCC_GetCertificateChainCertificate
syntax: void SCC_GetCertificateChainCertificate ( long Target, long Index, char Certificate[] )

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Index of the target certificate, where 0 denoted the parent certificate, and 1..4 denote sub-certificates
